summary: Implemented hardening recommendation rules engine with 7 rules: (1) revoke high-risk permissions (camera/mic/geo granted), (2) enable Do Not Track (DNT not '1'), (3) reduce fingerprint surface (entropy ≥ 70), (4) review notification permissions (notifications/push granted), (5) isolate browsing profiles (≥2 medium/high inferences), (6) clear persistent storage (persistent-storage granted or all storage supported with elevated entropy), (7) audit permission debt (debt ≥ 40). All rules are pure functions, content avoids certainty/fear language, and the module exports cleanly via barrel. All 54 US-029 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
